chunks.title: Inns & Cathedrals — Components to Add
chunks.content:
## New Components to Add at Setup

Shuffle these into the base game draw pile and supply before play begins.

| Component | Qty | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| New land tiles | 18 | Shuffle into the 71 base draw tiles (89-tile draw pile total, plus 1 starting tile) |
| Large Follower (per player color) | 1 each | Add to each player's supply alongside their 7 normal followers; returned when the feature it occupies is scored |
| Scoring tiles (50 pt / 100 pt) | several | Place face-up near the scoreboard; take a **50** tile when your marker passes 50 and reset to 0, then a **100** tile at 100 |

### 6th Player (optional)
- Add the **8 grey followers** (7 normal + 1 Large) to supply for the 6th player.
- Grey player also receives a score marker placed on 0.

### Tile Breakdown (18 new tiles)
| Tile type | Qty |
|---|---|
| Inn-lake tiles (road with lakeside inn symbol) | 6 |
| Cathedral tiles (city containing a cathedral) | 2 |
| Other new landscape tiles | 10 |

chunks.title: Inns & Cathedrals — New Tiles & Figures
chunks.content:
## New Tiles

| Tile Type | Count | What It Is | Effect |
|-----------|-------|------------|--------|
| Inn-lake tiles | 6 | Road tile with a lake icon bearing an inn symbol | Road passing through this tile: completed = **2 pts/tile** (double normal). Incomplete at end = **0 pts** (vs. base 1 pt/tile). |
| Cathedral tiles | 2 | City tile with a cathedral building inside | City containing this tile: completed = **3 pts/tile + 3 pts/pennant** (vs. base 2+2). Incomplete at end = **0 pts** (vs. base 1 pt/tile + 1 pt/pennant). |
| Other new tiles | 10 | Standard land tiles with varied terrain | No special rule — expand the map like normal tiles. |

**Total new tiles:** 18

## New Figures

| Figure | Who Gets One | How to Deploy | Special Rule |
|--------|-------------|---------------|-------------|
| Large Follower | 1 per player color | Placed like a normal follower on any legal feature | Counts as **2 normal followers** for majority in roads, cities, and fields. In monasteries counts as **1** (no bonus). Returned to supply when the feature scores. |
| Grey followers | 8 grey followers total | Used for a 6th player (grey color) | No special rule beyond enabling 6-player games. |

## Key Rules

- **Inn bonus is all-or-nothing:** double points if the road completes, zero if it doesn't.
- **Cathedral penalty is all-or-nothing:** bonus points if the city completes, zero if it doesn't.
- **Large Follower majority:** one Large Follower beats up to two normal followers; two normal followers tie one Large Follower.

chunks.title: Inns & Cathedrals — Modified Scoring Rules
chunks.content:
## Roads with Inns

An inn symbol (lake icon) on a road tile modifies scoring for the **entire road** it belongs to.

| State | Base Game | With Inn |
|---|---|---|
| Completed road | 1 pt/tile | **2 pts/tile** |
| Incomplete at end of game | 1 pt/tile | **0 pts** |

- Multiple inns on the same road do not stack — the road still scores 2×/tile (or 0) once.

## Cities with Cathedrals

A cathedral tile inside a city modifies scoring for the **entire city** it belongs to.

| State | Base Game | With Cathedral |
|---|---|---|
| Completed city (per tile) | 2 pts | **3 pts** |
| Completed city (per pennant) | 2 pts | **3 pts** |
| Incomplete at end of game | 1 pt/tile + 1 pt/pennant | **0 pts** |

- Only one cathedral is needed to trigger the bonus/penalty for the entire city.

## Large Follower (Majority)

| Context | Effect |
|---|---|
| Majority contest | Counts as **2 normal followers** |
| Points scored | Same as 1 normal follower (no point bonus) |

- Applies to roads, cities, and fields. No bonus in monasteries.
